09

VM-Machine

Proxmox is a server that integrates KVM (Virtual Machine) and LXC (Container) in a single web-based interface. Proxmox enables efficient management of virtual servers, networks, and storage, and supports clustering and high availability (HA) features to minimize downtime.

Proxmox
View Details
